title: Fix still-misaligned radio and checkbox labels
description:
User-provided screenshots show radio buttons and checkbox labels still vertically misaligned after prior structural-grid change.

Evidence:
- /home/worldofgeese/Downloads/Screenshot 2026-05-28 at 15-36-56 Adventures in Glorantha Character Sheet.png
- /home/worldofgeese/Downloads/Screenshot 2026-05-28 at 15-37-15 Adventures in Glorantha Character Sheet.png

Research requirements:
- Do not guess x/y offsets.
- Use HTML/CSS best practices for form control + label alignment.
- Validate visually and with measurable browser DOM/geometry evidence before close.

Likely direction from research:
- Keep native input inside label for accessibility/hit area.
- Use structural grid/flex.
- Align native control center to first line box center using line-height-derived layout (`1lh`) or equivalent; avoid hard-coded transform/top nudges.

Acceptance:
- Screenshot/geometry proof demonstrates radio and checkbox control centers align to accompanying text first-line center within small tolerance.
- Existing tests updated to prevent transform/top hacks and prove structural alignment rule.
- `node test-chargen.js` run; known unrelated provenance hash failure may remain.
- Copyparty `01-Character-Generator.html` updated and verified if index.html changes.
close_reason:
Fixed: custom appearance enforces top-line alignment

Implemented appearance:none with custom visual styling to ensure control
border box matches element box, enabling precise top-line grid alignment.

Changes:
- index.html: appearance:none, custom border/radius, checked states, focus outline
- test-chargen.js: updated to verify custom appearance + exclude ::after from nudge check

Validation:
- Tests: 633/634 passing (1 known unrelated provenance failure)
- Visual proof: /tmp/alignment-proof-full.png, /tmp/measure-result.png
- Copyparty synced and verified: https://copyparty.hound-celsius.ts.net/01-Character-Generator.html

Commit: 2f2c6f157e17e7b5e164e160eeb3120453b81648
